threads.topic: Docker command for building rusEFI
threads.summary: @ggurov provided a docker run command used to build the rusEFI project, which maps the local repository directory to the container and exposes specific ports.
key_details: ```docker run --rm -it -v `pwd`/repo:/rusefi -p 30001:29001 -p 30002:29002 --name rusefi_build rusefi_build:0.1 $*```
`-v \`pwd\`/repo:/rusefi`: Maps the local `repo` directory to `/rusefi` in the container
`-p 30001:29001 -p 30002:29002`: Exposes ports 30001 and 30002 on the host, which map to ports 29001 and 29002 in the container
`--name rusefi_build`: Names the container as `rusefi_build`
`rusefi_build:0.1`: Specifies the Docker image version
threads.raw_summary:
TOPIC: Docker command for building rusEFI
CONTRIBUTORS: @ggurov
SUMMARY: @ggurov provided a docker run command used to build the rusEFI project, which maps the local repository directory to the container and exposes specific ports.
KEY_DETAILS:
- ```docker run --rm -it -v `pwd`/repo:/rusefi -p 30001:29001 -p 30002:29002 --name rusefi_build rusefi_build:0.1 $*```
- `-v \`pwd\`/repo:/rusefi`: Maps the local `repo` directory to `/rusefi` in the container
- `-p 30001:29001 -p 30002:29002`: Exposes ports 30001 and 30002 on the host, which map to ports 29001 and 29002 in the container
- `--name rusefi_build`: Names the container as `rusefi_build`
- `rusefi_build:0.1`: Specifies the Docker image version
